fold_projection_result_label: After the shown fold is made, which labeled option shows the visible mark pattern?
Fold the paper along the dashed line in the arrow direction. Which result option matches the folded sheet?
Which option shows the mark pattern after applying the indicated fold?
Mentally fold the sheet as shown. Which labeled result is correct?
Use the fold direction in the diagram. Which result option shows the final folded pattern?
fold_cut_result_label: Which option shows the unfolded paper after the indicated fold or folds and cut?
Select the unfolded-result option for the fold-and-cut puzzle.
Choose the option that matches the paper after the indicated folding, cutting, and unfolding.
Which labeled option is the correct unfolded result?
Identify the final hole pattern after the shown fold-and-cut process.
overlay_union_result_label: If the two source sheets are placed on top of each other, which result option shows every marked cell that would be visible?
Combine the marks from the two aligned source sheets. Which labeled result option matches the combined sheet?
Overlay the two source sheets in the same grid position. Which option shows the union of their marked cells?
Which result option contains exactly the cells marked on either source sheet?
Mentally stack the two transparent sheets. Which labeled option shows the resulting set of marks?
